sq SqueezyAgent
How it works Docs Benchmarks
GitHub
evolving roadmap

Bold vision. Honest status.

SqueezyAgent will not pretend the product is done before v0. This page is the draft contract: what is being built, what is not yet proven, and what needs evidence before it becomes a public claim.

now

Foundation and product shape

Rust implementation, TUI foundation, OpenAI Responses streaming, Anthropic Messages streaming, bounded fallback tools, web access policy, output receipts, validation harness tasks, and design docs. Graph-backed navigation remains the core v0 work.

v0 target

Rust semantic navigation

Tree-sitter Rust parser, local semantic graph, symbol lookup, references, call candidates, test pairing, impact queries, and targeted span reads.

v0 target

Cost machinery

Receipt-backed read dedup, aggregate tool-result budgets, compact evidence packets, provider-aware cost estimates, and visible spend summaries.

proof

Benchmark receipts

Deterministic harness runs already support mock OpenAI, mock Anthropic, and grep-baseline tasks in CI. Public cost claims should wait for live receipt traces with tool calls, files read, tokens, wall-clock, and correctness.

release

macOS and Linux artifacts

v0 targets macOS and Linux. Linux release artifacts are planned as statically linked musl binaries so they do not depend on glibc.

later

More languages and adapters

Python and framework-aware navigation after the Rust proof works. Unsupported languages remain explicit fallbacks, not silent guesses.

sq SqueezyAgent

A local static engine helps the agent understand code structure before wasting LLM tokens on search.
